# Will AI Take My Job?

> Will AI Take My Job? is a UK-focused AI job risk checker and career guidance site. It explains how AI may change specific roles, which tasks are exposed first, and what workers can do next.

Use this file as the compact AI-readable guide to the site. The canonical human site is https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/. The full machine-readable context file is https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/llms-full.txt. Scores are directional career guidance, not legal, financial, or employment advice.

## Core Pages

- [Homepage and job risk checker](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/): Search a job title and get a practical AI change score.
- [All jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/jobs/): Browse all 30 role guides.
- [Methodology](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/methodology/): How the scoring model weighs task exposure, judgement, regulation, relationships, physical presence, and adoption speed.
- [Editorial policy](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/editorial-policy/): Research, review, corrections, and commercial independence standards.
- [About](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/about/): Who the site is for and how to interpret the guidance.
- [Privacy policy](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/privacy/): Analytics and data collection information.

## Topic Hubs

- [Jobs safe from AI](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/jobs-safe-from-ai/): The jobs most resilient to AI tend to mix hands-on work, trust, judgement, regulation, care, leadership, and local accountability.
- [Jobs most at risk from AI](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/jobs-most-at-risk-from-ai/): Roles built around repeatable text, admin, support, and content production face faster AI disruption. See the job types to watch.
- [Best AI skills to learn](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/best-ai-skills-to-learn/): Practical AI skills for workers who want to stay useful: prompting, checking, automation, data judgement, workflow design, and domain expertise.

## Role Guides

- [Software developer jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-software-developer-jobs/): Lower change (44/100). The role changes quickly, but developers who understand products, systems, security, users, and deployment still have leverage.
- [Accounting Jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-accounting-jobs/): Medium change (58/100). Routine bookkeeping and reporting are exposed. Advisory work, tax judgement, audit quality, and client trust are harder to automate.
- [Teacher jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-teacher-jobs/): Lower change (28/100). AI will help with planning, feedback, tutoring, and admin, but classrooms still need care, authority, safeguarding, and judgement.
- [Graphic Design Jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-graphic-design-jobs/): Medium change (67/100). Basic asset production is under pressure. Brand strategy, taste, art direction, client handling, and campaign thinking matter more.
- [Copywriter jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-copywriter-jobs/): High change (72/100). Generic copy is heavily exposed. Research, positioning, voice, conversion strategy, and accountability still create value.
- [Customer service agent jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-customer-service-agent-jobs/): High change (76/100). Tier-one support is a prime automation target. Complex complaints, empathy, retention, and escalation work are safer.
- [Data analyst jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-data-analyst-jobs/): Medium change (55/100). Basic dashboards and SQL are easier to generate. Business context, data quality, experiment design, and storytelling keep value high.
- [Project manager jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-project-manager-jobs/): Medium change (45/100). Status reporting gets automated. The safer value is unblocking people, handling trade-offs, and making decisions stick.
- [Marketing manager jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-marketing-manager-jobs/): Medium change (52/100). Content production accelerates. Brand judgement, distribution, experiments, and commercial accountability become more important.
- [Solicitor jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-solicitor-jobs/): Lower change (39/100). Document review and drafting will speed up. Legal responsibility, negotiation, strategy, and regulated judgement remain human-led.
- [Paralegal jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-paralegal-jobs/): Medium change (63/100). Research, document prep, and review workflows are exposed. Matter management, evidence handling, client care, and legal process knowledge still matter.
- [Nurse jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-nurse-jobs/): Lower change (18/100). AI can help with notes, triage, and scheduling, but hands-on care, accountability, and patient trust are resilient.
- [Doctor jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-doctor-jobs/): Lower change (24/100). AI will support diagnosis, documentation, and triage, but clinical accountability, bedside judgement, and patient trust remain central.
- [Electrician jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-electrician-jobs/): Lower change (12/100). Physical skilled work is resilient. AI helps quotes, diagnostics, stock, and paperwork rather than replacing the trade.
- [Plumber jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-plumber-jobs/): Lower change (13/100). Hands-on trade work remains hard to automate. The biggest gains come from better booking, quoting, diagnostics, and customer follow-up.
- [HR manager jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-hr-manager-jobs/): Medium change (46/100). HR admin and screening will change. Employee relations, policy judgement, investigations, and trust-heavy conversations stay human-led.
- [Recruiter jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-recruiter-jobs/): Medium change (62/100). Sourcing and screening are exposed. Market knowledge, trust, candidate relationships, and hiring strategy still matter.
- [Sales representative jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-sales-representative-jobs/): Lower change (41/100). Prospecting and CRM admin will automate. Trust, negotiation, discovery, and complex account strategy remain valuable.
- [Financial adviser jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-financial-adviser-jobs/): Lower change (36/100). AI can assist planning and portfolio analysis, but regulated advice, trust, suitability, and life context keep humans central.
- [Administrative assistant jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-admin-assistant-jobs/): High change (74/100). Calendar, document, and inbox tasks are highly exposed. Safer admin careers move toward coordination, judgement, and trusted operations.
- [Bookkeeper jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-bookkeeper-jobs/): High change (70/100). Bookkeeping is one of the clearest automation targets. Review, exception handling, client support, and advisory add resilience.
- [Translator jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-translator-jobs/): Medium change (68/100). General translation is exposed. Specialist terminology, culture, legal or medical context, and editing machine output are safer.
- [Journalist jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-journalist-jobs/): Medium change (57/100). Commodity summaries and rewrites are exposed. Original reporting, sources, investigation, editorial judgement, and trust still matter.
- [Architect jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-architect-jobs/): Lower change (34/100). AI will speed up concepts, compliance checks, and visualisation. Client judgement, constraints, accountability, and coordination stay valuable.
- [Mechanic jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-mechanic-jobs/): Lower change (17/100). Physical diagnostics and repair are resilient. AI helps fault-finding, parts lookup, service notes, and customer communication.
- [Chef jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-chef-jobs/): Lower change (22/100). AI can help menus, costing, and stock, but cooking, leadership, consistency, and customer experience remain human.
- [Retail assistant jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-retail-assistant-jobs/): Medium change (61/100). Checkout and simple product queries are exposed. Advice, service, merchandising, and local customer relationships are safer.
- [Warehouse operative jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-warehouse-operative-jobs/): Medium change (49/100). Robotics and optimisation will change warehouses unevenly. Roles involving equipment, exceptions, safety, and supervision are safer.
- [UX designer jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-ux-designer-jobs/): Medium change (51/100). Wireframes and research summaries will get faster. Product thinking, facilitation, accessibility, and user judgement keep value high.
- [Cybersecurity analyst jobs](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/will-ai-take-cybersecurity-analyst-jobs/): Lower change (32/100). AI will automate triage and reporting, but threats also grow. Human judgement, incident response, and security ownership stay valuable.

## Structured Data

- [Sitemap](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/sitemap.xml): XML sitemap for indexable pages.
- [Full LLM context](https://willaitakemyjob.co.uk/llms-full.txt): Expanded plain-text context for AI assistants and agents.
